compiled_state.title: Remove v2 .tickets/ comments from merge-to-main.sh and add .test-index entries
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Remove v2 references from merge-to-main.sh comments and add .test-index entries. (1) plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh: update comment-only lines referencing v2 .tickets/ path patterns. Line 390 comment: remove '.tickets/archive/' mention. Line 442 comment: remove 'v2 .tickets/*.md (including .tickets/archive/*.md)' from the comment. Line 648 comment: remove '.tickets/.index.json' auto-resolve reference if it describes v2 behavior. Lines 1148: remove v2/v3 parenthetical comment. Only modify comments/documentation in the file — do NOT modify functional code (that is story 12b9-45d8 scope). (2) Add .test-index entries mapping each modified doc file to tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh so the test gate can verify coverage. test-exempt: no conditional logic, pure comment edits. Regression verified by RED test bbfb-ce09.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
